title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 27 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 27 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 27 2026
summary:
Main
Today, the iron ore futures market showed weak fluctuations. The main contract I2609 finally closed at 781.5RMB/ton, down slightly by 0.32% from the previous trading session. Port spot prices remained largely unchanged from the previous day.
